metadata.title: KOVO-KUKY | CNC Machining & Custom Manufacturing
metadata.description: Professional CNC machining, turning, milling, and metal cutting. Custom manufacturing from steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and brass. Quote within 48 hours.

hero.title: Precision CNC machining
hero.subtitle: We manufacture parts exactly to your drawings. On CNC lathes and mills, we process steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and brass — fast, reliably, and with hundredths-of-a-millimeter precision.
hero.cardCta: Send a drawing — get a quote within 48 hours
hero.socialProof: We work with companies from CZ, SK, DE, and AT

services.label: What we do
services.title: Complete CNC Machining
services.subtitle: From single pieces to series — we handle everything under one roof

turning.title: CNC Turning
turning.description: Precision turning on Doosan Lynx 220 and Goodway GLS CNC lathes with Fanuc control. Rotational parts from steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and brass with ±0.01 mm tolerance.

milling.title: CNC Milling
milling.description: 3-axis milling on XHS and Robodrill centers with Fanuc control. Manufacturing precision parts from drawings or 3D models, from prototypes to series.

cutting.title: Material Cutting
cutting.description: Precision cutting of bar stock and profiles on Bianco saws. Cuts to your dimensions with minimal waste.

external.title: External Services
external.description: Complete service including galvanizing, welding, and other surface treatments through verified partners. No extra hassle.

process.label: How it works
process.title: From inquiry to finished part
process.subtitle: Simple and transparent process — you know exactly what's happening with your order

step1.title: Send an inquiry
step1.description: Fill out the form and attach a drawing. PDF, DXF, or STEP is all you need.

step2.title: Get a quote
step2.description: Within 48 hours, we'll send you a price quote with delivery timeline.

step3.title: We manufacture
step3.description: After approval, we start production on our CNC machines.

step4.title: We deliver
step4.description: Finished parts are inspected and delivered on the agreed date.

whyUs.label: Why us
whyUs.title: Why choose KOVO-KUKY?
whyUs.subtitle: Dozens of companies trust us. Here's why.

precision.title: Hundredths mm precision
precision.description: CNC machines with Fanuc control guarantee repeatable precision of ±0.01 mm on every part.

quality.title: 100% quality control
quality.description: Every part is measured and inspected before shipping. No compromises.

delivery.title: Reliable delivery
delivery.description: We meet agreed deadlines. When we say a date, it holds.

support.title: Personal approach
support.description: You communicate directly with production, not a call center. We solve things quickly, without bureaucracy.

speed.title: Fast quotes
speed.description: You'll receive a price quote within 48 hours of sending your inquiry with a drawing.

certified.title: Verified partner
certified.description: We work with companies from the Czech Republic, Slovakia, Germany, and Austria.

t1.text: Working with KOVO-KUKY is seamless. Parts are always precise, deadlines met, and communication is excellent. Highly recommended.
t1.name: Martin Novák

t2.text: We needed prototype parts made quickly. KOVO-KUKY responded immediately and delivered top quality. We'll be coming back.
t2.name: Thomas Berger

t3.text: Excellent price-to-quality ratio. Parts exactly per drawing, zero complaints. We've been working together for three years.
t3.name: Peter Kováč

cta.title: Need custom manufacturing?
cta.subtitle: Send us a drawing and get a price quote within 48 hours. No obligations, no waiting.
cta.note: Non-binding inquiry — we'll reply within 48 hours

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: From a garage to 13 CNC machines
about.intro: KOVO-KUKY is a family business with over 30 years of tradition. What started in a small garage is now a modern production facility with 13 machines and a team of 6.

story.title: How it all began
story.part1: Václav Kukačka Sr. walked out of his job one day. Not because he found a better offer — he was just fed up. Instead of looking for new employment, he decided to go it alone. In a tiny garage that barely fit one car, he started making trailers.
story.part2: Work kept growing. Trailers turned into metalwork — gates, fences, anything that could be made by hand. When orders increased, he got his first manual lathe and milling machine. He took on everything that came his way.
story.part3: Next came sheet metal pressing. First one press, then more. He did pressing for ETA, and that allowed him to invest in automatic lathes. Orders kept coming.
story.part4: Then came CNC. First machine, no courses, no training. He learned by himself, trial and error. But he learned.

transition.title: Passing the torch
transition.text: Around 2000, Václav started handing the company over to his son — also named Václav. He learned CNC from his father, brought in new contracts, and gradually grew the business into what it is today.

today.title: KOVO-KUKY today
today.text: 13 machines, 6 employees, customers from Czech Republic and abroad. Still a family business, still a personal approach. We do what we do best — precision CNC machining.

precision.title: Craftsmanship
precision.description: We started by hand, now we have CNC. But the approach stays the same — honest and precise work.

reliability.title: Our word counts
reliability.description: When we say a deadline, we mean it. No excuses.

flexibility.title: We figure it out
flexibility.description: Single piece, series, prototype — we handle it. And if we don't know something, we'll tell you.

quality.title: Family business
quality.description: We're not a corporation. You deal directly with the people who make your parts.
